Our Process

Full-cycle emergency response, launch within 2 hours

01
01

Consultation

Free assessment of recovery possibilities with professional advice

Submit case information for expert preliminary on-chain analysis and feasibility assessment

02
02

Expert Assignment

Professional analyst assigned within 2 hours for deep case understanding

Senior on-chain analyst tracks fund flows and locks key evidence

03
03

Strategy Planning

On-chain tracking + Legal assistance for custom recovery solutions

Integrate technical and legal approaches for optimal recovery strategy

04
04

Execution

Dedicated case team follows through until asset recovery

Transparent progress updates throughout, assisting with asset recovery and legal procedures

Consultation Plans

Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include free initial assessment

Help & Report
Free

Record your request for potential free assistance

  • Junior analyst provides free tracing proposal
  • Response within 1 week
  • Report illegal projects for rewards
On-Chain Expert
199 USDT

For individual users seeking quick consultation and basic analysis

  • Response within 4 hours
  • 60-minute in-depth phone consultation
  • Basic tracking analysis
  • Asset recovery feasibility assessment
Recommended
Expert Consultation
1499 USDT
Was 2499 USDT

Comprehensive consultation with tracing analyst + legal expert

  • Web3 senior lawyer consultation
  • Technical expert team joint consultation
  • Detailed asset tracking plan
  • Professional rights protection guidance
  • Cross-chain asset analysis
  • 7-day unlimited communication
VIP Custom
Contact for Quote

Exclusive service for major loss cases

  • Dedicated special task force
  • Customized rights protection solution
  • One-on-one full follow-up
  • Cross-border legal support
  • CTO responsible for delivery
  • Refund if no recovery

* Service results vary depending on case circumstances. We do not guarantee 100% recovery success rate. We promise to do our best to provide professional services.

On-chain analysis and legal collaboration experts

Client Testimonials

Voices from real clients (privacy information anonymized)

“After losing USDT to a phishing attack, I was devastated. The USDTRecovery team responded to my request within 2 hours, tracked the fund flow through professional on-chain analysis, and eventually helped me recover most of my assets. The entire process was professional and transparent, restoring my confidence in crypto security.”

DeFi Investor$128,000
USDT Phishing

“My OKX account was frozen and I was in a difficult situation. I contacted multiple agencies with no success. USDTRecovery's legal team, with their extensive experience, helped me unfreeze my account within a week. Their cross-border legal collaboration capabilities are truly impressive.”

OTC Merchant$85,000
Exchange Account Frozen

“I participated in a DeFi project that turned out to be a rug pull. The USDTRecovery team tracked the fund flows multi-dimensionally, assisted the police in arresting the suspects, and recovered partial assets. Although not all funds were recovered, it far exceeded my expectations.”

Quantitative Trader$230,000
Rug Pull Scam

“After being scammed by fake customer service, I contacted USDTRecovery immediately. Their response speed and professionalism impressed me. They successfully froze part of the scammer's assets through technical means. Highly recommended to anyone needing digital asset security services.”

Individual Investor$45,000
Fake Customer Service Scam

“My bank card was frozen during withdrawal, and multiple consultations yielded no results. USDTRecovery's legal advisory team analyzed the case in detail, provided a professional unfreezing solution, and resolved the issue within two weeks. Professional matters should be left to professional teams.”

Cross-border Trader$62,000
Bank Card Frozen

Why Choose Us?

Expert Team: Analysts + Legal Experts + Lawyers
Fast Response: Emergency freeze within 2 hours
Full Transparency: Real-time case progress updates
Confidentiality: Strict client privacy protection
Success-Based: Some services charge only on success

Always here for you, anytime, anywhere
